faq.question: How does nWorks simplify workforce scheduling?
faq.answer: nWorks uses intelligent rostering that considers staff availability, certifications, and legal compliance to automate complex scheduling while optimizing coverage.

faq.question: Can nWorks help with compliance tracking?
faq.answer: Yes! nWorks provides automated compliance tracking with alerts for document expiry and role-specific access controls to ensure all staff meet requirements.

faq.question: Does nWorks integrate with our existing systems?
faq.answer: Absolutely. nWorks offers seamless integrations with HR systems, payroll platforms, and compliance tools to streamline workflows across your organization.

faq.question: Is there a trial available?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a demo so you can experience how nWorks simplifies scheduling, compliance, and reporting before making any commitment.
